title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description:
Join our team building AI-native developer tools. You'll work closely with Cursor daily to ship features fast. We're a small, senior team — you'll have real ownership over product direction.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement full-stack features using Next.js and TypeScript
- Integrate LLM APIs into developer workflows
- Review AI-generated code and set quality standards
- Mentor junior engineers on AI-assisted development best practices

You should apply if:
- You're a daily Cursor or Copilot user and have opinions about what works
- You can go from idea to deployed feature in a single day
- You care about code quality and don't let AI sloppiness ship

title: AI-Assisted Backend Engineer
description:
We're rebuilding our data pipeline with an AI-first approach. You'll use Cursor to accelerate development on our Python/Go backend, writing services that process millions of healthcare records daily.

The role:
- Build and maintain high-throughput data pipelines in Python and Go
- Use Cursor to prototype new services and iterate quickly
- Write comprehensive tests (including AI-generated test suites)
- Own reliability for services processing PHI data

Requirements:
- 3+ years backend experience
- Proficiency with Cursor or similar AI coding tools
- Experience with data pipelines at scale
- HIPAA compliance knowledge a plus

title: Frontend Engineer – AI Tooling
description:
We're looking for a frontend engineer who uses AI tools as a force multiplier. You'll build merchant-facing features in our React app and help define how our engineering team adopts AI-assisted development.

What you'll do:
- Build and ship React components with Cursor
- Establish AI coding guidelines for the frontend team
- Contribute to design system in Figma + code
- Collaborate with design and product on rapid prototyping

Nice to have:
- Experience running Cursor in a team setting
- Opinions on AI code review workflows
- Previous experience at a startup

title: Platform Engineer (Contract)
description:
6-month contract to help us modernize our CI/CD infrastructure. We're a hardware company that moves fast — we need someone who can use AI tools to automate the boring parts and get our pipelines humming.

Scope of work:
- Migrate legacy Jenkins pipelines to GitHub Actions
- Write IaC with Terraform (Cursor-assisted)
- Implement automated testing gates for firmware + software
- Document everything thoroughly

Ideal for someone who:
- Can autonomously drive an infra project
- Uses AI tools daily for scripting and automation
- Communicates clearly in async remote settings

title: Junior Developer – AI-Native Team
description:
Your first real engineering job — on a team that pairs every engineer with AI tools from day one. We believe AI-assisted development is the future of junior engineering education, and we're proving it.

What we offer:
- Mentorship from senior engineers who take AI development seriously
- A Cursor Pro subscription on day one
- Weekly AI tooling workshops
- Real ownership of features, not just bug fixes

We're looking for:
- A CS degree or bootcamp grad with strong fundamentals
- Curiosity about how LLMs work
- A portfolio with at least one Cursor-built project
- Boston-area (hybrid, 3 days/week in Cambridge)

title: ML Infrastructure Engineer
description:
We're building the infrastructure that lets our data scientists ship models to production in hours, not weeks. You'll own the MLOps platform and use Cursor to move fast on internal tooling.

Tech stack:
- Python, Rust for performance-critical paths
- Kubernetes, AWS
- Ray, MLflow, Feast
- Cursor for everything — we're serious about AI-native development

You'll thrive here if:
- You find infra problems intellectually interesting
- You use Cursor for more than just boilerplate
- You can hold your own in conversations with ML researchers
